Business Name: CAT Scale — Pilot Travel Center #231, Corbin
Description: CAT certified truck scale at Pilot Travel Center #231, located at I-75/US-25E Exit 29 in Corbin. Host is a 24-hour truck stop with diesel and DEF lanes.
CAT scale at the TA Florence travel center, I-75 Exit 181 in Florence; host location open 24 hours.

Business Name: CAT Scale — Pilot Travel Center #353, Georgetown (Triport Rd)
Description: CAT scale at Pilot Travel Center #353 at I-75 Exit 129, Georgetown. POI Directory lists "CAT Scale Georgetown, Pilot Travel Centers, I-75 and Exit 129" with this phone.

Business Name: CAT Scale — Pilot Travel Center #47, Georgetown (Cherry Blossom Way)
Description: CAT scale at the Pilot Travel Center at 259 Cherry Blossom Way, one of two Pilot locations at I-75 Exit 129 in Georgetown. Directory listings show the CAT scale phone 502-868-7427 at this address.

CAT scale at London Travel Plaza (AMBEST, also known as London Auto Truck Center), an independent truck stop on I-75 at Exit 41 in London. The plaza advertises its CAT scale, fuel lanes and 100+ free parking spots.

Business Name: CAT Scale — Love's Travel Stop #291, Richmond
Description: CAT-brand certified truck scale located at Love's Travel Stop #291, I-75 Exit 95 in Richmond. CAT Scale's locator lists a Richmond, KY location at I-75 & Hwy 627, Exit 95, and Love's lists CAT Scales among this store's amenities.

Business Name: CAT Scale — Love's Travel Stop #618, Sadieville
Description: CAT scale at Love's Travel Stop #618 at I-75 Exit 136 (Porter Road) in Sadieville. Allstays' CAT list shows "I-75 & Exit 136 at Porter Road, Sadieville KY 40370" with this phone.

Business Name: CAT Scale — Flying J Travel Center #664, Walton
Description: CAT scale at Flying J Travel Center #664 at I-75 Exit 171 in Walton. Allstays' CAT list shows a scale at "I-75 Exit 171, ph 859-485-4400," matching this Flying J.

Business Name: CAT Scale — Mr. Fuel Travel Center, Walton
Description: CAT scale at the Mr. Fuel Travel Center (One9 Fuel Network), I-71/75 Exit 175 in Walton; host location open 24 hours.

Business Name: CAT Scale — Pilot Travel Center #321, Walton (Richwood)
Description: CAT scale at Pilot Travel Center #321 at I-71/I-75 Exit 175 (KY 338, Richwood) in Walton. Allstays' CAT list shows a scale at "I-75 & Hwy 338, Exit 175, ph 859-485-1327," matching this Pilot.
CAT certified scale at the TA Walton travel center at I-75/I-71 & KY 338, Exit 175. TA's location listing includes "CAT Scales and Certified Scale" among its amenities.

Business Name: CAT Scale — Pilot Travel Center #437, Williamsburg
Description: CAT certified truck scale at the Pilot Travel Center at I-75 Exit 11 in Williamsburg. Host truck stop is open 24 hours with diesel lanes and showers.

Econo Lodge near I-75 exit 76/77 in Berea with 5 truck parking spaces on the east side of the property per hotel-directory listings; pet-friendly with free breakfast. Guest reviews also report ample semi parking.
Budget motel located off I-75 Exit 77 in Berea offering free self parking plus RV, bus, and truck parking, per Motel 6 and booking-site listings.

Super 8 off I-75 exit 29 (US 25) in Corbin that advertises free parking and states it "can accommodate large trucks and recreation vehicles in their additional two lots adjacent to the property," with ample large-vehicle parking and 24-hour front desk.

Business Name: Microtel Inn & Suites by Wyndham Dry Ridge
Description: Microtel Inn & Suites at I-75 Exit 159 in Dry Ridge with free large-vehicle parking for trucks, buses and RVs, plus free WiFi and continental breakfast.

Econo Lodge near the I-71/I-75/I-275 junction in Erlanger (Cincinnati airport area) whose booking listings advertise RV, bus and truck parking on site; 70 rooms, free continental breakfast, WiFi, pet friendly, 24-hour front desk.
Best Western hotel near I-71/I-75 Exit 181 in Florence offering free long-term parking and free RV, bus and truck parking, with complimentary wireless internet.

Business Name: Quality Inn & Suites Florence - Cincinnati South
Description: Quality Inn just off the I-71/I-75 corridor in Florence; appeared in a hotels-with-truck-parking search result, but its official/booking pages verify only general free parking.
Motel 6 at I-75 exit 129 in Georgetown; a truck-stop directory lists 3 truck parking spots and guest reports say trucks park in the gravel area beside the hotel. Coin laundry and free WiFi.

Business Name: Super 8 by Wyndham Lexington/Hamburg Area (Winchester Rd)
Description: Motor inn just off I-75 Exit 110 (Winchester Rd/US-60) in Lexington with free parking for cars and large vehicles; listed in trucking directories under motels with truck parking at I-75 Exit 110.

Business Name: Haven Hotel Renfro Valley (formerly Days Inn by Wyndham Renfro Valley)
Description: Days Inn off I-75 exit 62 at Renfro Valley/Mount Vernon advertising an extra-large parking area with easy in/out access for tour buses and trucks — "large buses and trucks park and drive off without backing out." Free RV, bus and truck parking per hotel/booking pages.
Days Inn near I-75 exit 90 in Richmond whose Wyndham property page advertises "free parking for your car, bus, truck, or RV." Approximately 0.3 mi from the exit per hotel directories.
Super 8 near I-75 exit 90 in Richmond advertising "free parking for car, bus, truck, or RV" on its Wyndham property page, plus free breakfast, WiFi, 24-hour front desk and guest laundry.
Super 8 off I-75 exit 11 on KY-92 in Williamsburg offering free car/bus/truck/RV parking per hotel booking listings.
Independent motel right off I-75 in Williamstown (across from the Ark Encounter area) whose booking listings advertise RV/bus/truck parking. Pet friendly.

Commercial tire dealer and retreader with a Corbin location, offering commercial truck/trailer tires and 24/7 mobile roadside tire and repair service across Central and Eastern Kentucky via a nine-truck mobile fleet.
24-hour emergency roadside assistance, towing and wrecker service for all vehicles including 18-wheelers, serving Corbin, Gray and Williamsburg on the southern Kentucky I-75 corridor.

24/7 mobile roadside diesel and heavy-truck repair based in Corinth, KY, covering a 65-mile radius including Dry Ridge, Georgetown, Sadieville, Lexington and Frankfort — the middle I-75 corridor between Lexington and Northern Kentucky. Truck and trailer repairs, DOT inspections, electrical, hydraulics, AC/reefer, brakes, suspensions.

TA Truck Service shop with 6 service bays at the TA Florence travel center, I-75 Exit 181, providing truck and trailer repair, roadside assistance and commercial tires from brands including Bridgestone, Goodyear, Michelin, Yokohama and Continental.
Truck and trailer repair shop on Triport Rd in Georgetown, open 24 hours seven days a week, with ASE-certified technicians providing 24/7 roadside repair within a 50-mile radius of the shop.

Heavy-duty truck repair shop with 24/7 mobile truck repair and roadside assistance serving Lexington, Harrodsburg and a 50-mile radius, which covers the I-75 corridor from Berea/Richmond through Georgetown.

Business Name: Thorough Truck & Barger Towing (Thoroughtruck Truck Repair and Towing)
Description: Heavy truck repair and towing company in Mount Vernon on US-25/N Wilderness Rd along the I-75 Rockcastle County corridor (exits 59/62 area); NAPA-affiliated truck repair with heavy-duty wrecker and semi towing/recovery.

Business Name: HOB-CO LLC Mobile Truck & Trailer Repair
Description: Mobile truck, trailer and tire repair outfit based in Richmond, KY that explicitly advertises serving I-75 from Mt. Vernon to Georgetown (highlighting exit 77) and I-64 from Mount Sterling to Lexington; roadside breakdowns, on-site repairs, jumpstarts, fuel delivery, PM service, and new/used/recap tires.

24-hour light and heavy-duty towing, 24-hour roadside service, semi truck and trailer repair, and mobile computer diagnostics from a full-service repair facility in Walton at I-75 exit 171 corridor (Walton-Verona Rd), serving Walton KY/Cincinnati OH.
Independent truck and tire service shop in Berea named for and serving the I-75 exit 76 truck stop area; commercial truck tire and repair work.

Bosselman Boss Truck Shop at I-75 Exit 29 in Corbin, located at the Love's Travel Stop, offering mobile and in-shop truck/trailer tire repair, oil changes, brakes, diagnostics, and DOT inspections with a 24-hour emergency breakdown call center.

Business Name: Love's Truck Care / Speedco - Love's Travel Stop #321, Corbin
Description: Love's Travel Stop #321 at I-75 exit 29 in Corbin with on-site Speedco/Love's Truck Care offering commercial tire sales and repair (Hankook, Bridgestone, Michelin, Goodyear, Yokohama, Love's Retreads), light mechanical, oil changes and 24/7 emergency roadside assistance.

Commercial truck tire dealer and Bandag retread shop in Erlanger near the I-71/I-75 corridor south of Cincinnati, offering 24-hour emergency road service, truck/tractor/trailer tire service, in-house and mobile alignments, wheel refinishing, air-up programs and yard checks (Bridgestone, Firestone, Dayton, Bandag).
Goodyear Commercial Tire & Service Center on Triport Rd in Georgetown's I-75 industrial corridor, serving commercial trucks with extended hours (Mon-Fri 7am-10pm, Sat 7am-2pm, Sun 7am-11am).

Commercial truck tire shop at the Pilot Travel Center complex on Triport Circle, Georgetown (I-75 Exit 129 per directory listing), offering tire sales/service, maintenance, DOT inspections and 24/7 roadside assistance.

Commercial truck tire dealer and Kentucky's largest retreading plant, offering truck/farm/OTR/industrial tires and 24/7 service, per the official site, which describes the Lexington facility as central to I-75 and I-64. The company also advertises 55 safe, secure truck-trailer parking spots at the Lexington plant.

Business Name: S&S Tire / Best-One Tire Commercial Center
Description: Commercial truck tire center in Lexington (Bridgestone/Firestone and Michelin commercial dealer) providing fleet tire service, mobile/on-site tire repair and emergency roadside assistance for Central Kentucky, including the I-75/I-64 Lexington corridor. S&S Tire runs 16 company-owned commercial locations across KY, TN, AL and WV.

Snider Fleet Solutions operates a Lexington commercial tire and mechanical service location (per its own locations pages), part of a 70+ location network with 24/7 emergency roadside service (1-877-8SNIDER); Lexington sits on the I-75/I-64 corridor.
Commercial tire dealer serving Lexington with fleet truck tire sales, retreading, preventative maintenance, and 24/7 roadside assistance, per the official Ziegler Tire site.

Business Name: Love's Truck Care - Love's Travel Stop #291, Richmond
Description: Love's Truck Care at Love's Travel Stop #291, I-75 exit 95 in Richmond, open 24 hours with commercial tire service (Bridgestone, Michelin, Goodyear, Yokohama, Love's Retread), oil changes/PM, light mechanical and emergency roadside assistance; travel stop has roughly 70 truck parking spaces, showers and Arby's.

Business Name: Love's Truck Care / Speedco - Love's Travel Stop #618, Sadieville
Description: 2-bay Speedco/Love's Truck Care at Love's Travel Stop #618, I-75 Exit 136, offering truck tire service, oil change/PM, light mechanical and emergency roadside assistance; open 24 hours.

Second-generation family-owned, NAPA-certified truck service center near the I-71/75 Richwood exit (Exit 175) in Walton, offering commercial tire sales and service plus truck and trailer repair, with three mobile roadside service trucks and a 14,000 sq ft shop.

TA Truck Service shop at the TA Walton travel center, I-75/I-71 exit 175 (KY-338/Richwood Rd), offering commercial tire mounting and nail-hole repair, all-wheel alignment, brakes, electrical, DOT inspections, advanced diagnostics, HVAC, trailer and aftertreatment work; Michelin commercial dealer.
Truck Parking Club offers bookable truck/trailer parking at 151 N Dogwood Dr, Berea (76 Truck Plaza), adjacent to the 76 Fuel Center truck stop complex at I-75 exit 76.
Independent secure truck parking lot in Corbin, KY advertising overnight and long-term commercial vehicle parking in a well-lit, gravel-paved lot minutes off I-75.

Business Name: Truck Parking Club - 250 W Cumberland Gap Pkwy (Corbin)
Description: Bookable truck parking on Truck Parking Club just off I-75 at exit 29 in Corbin, with 24/7 access and a combination gravel/paved lot. Listing notes truck stops, Cracker Barrel, Walmart Supercenter and numerous restaurants within walking distance.
Truck and trailer parking bookable on Truck Parking Club at 830 Byrley Rd, Corbin (also indexed on Trucker Path); hourly/daily/weekly/monthly reservations in the I-75 Corbin market.

Business Name: Truck Parking Club - Shell/Gold Star Lot, 355 Violet Rd (Crittenden)
Description: 24-hour Shell station with Gold Star Chili at I-75 Exit 166 (KY-491, Crittenden); Truck Parking Club's sitemap lists "Truck and Trailer Parking on 355 Violet Rd" at this address.

Business Name: Kentucky Welcome Center / Rest Area (I-71/75, Boone County)
Description: State rest area on I-71/75 near Florence in Boone County (around milepost 176-177, between exits 175 and 180): welcome center on the southbound side and rest area northbound, with separate truck and passenger parking, restrooms, vending and picnic areas.

Bookable truck parking on Truck Parking Club at 8145 Connector Dr, Florence (site shared with CubeSmart Self Storage), with 24/7 access and a paved lot; listing states it is 1.5 miles from I-71 exit 180 in the Florence I-71/I-75 corridor. No dropped trailers allowed.
Truck and trailer parking bookable on Truck Parking Club at 8477 US-42, Florence, in the I-71/I-75 Florence corridor; hourly/daily/weekly/monthly reservations. Also indexed by Trucker Path.
Kentucky state rest area on I-75 northbound at mile marker 127 in Scott County with separate truck and passenger-vehicle parking, restrooms, vending and picnic areas.
Kentucky state rest area on I-75 southbound at mile marker 127 in Scott County; a truck-parking profile lists capacity of 47 truck spots, with restrooms, vending and picnic areas.
Bookable truck and trailer parking on Truck Parking Club at 194 Sims Pike, Georgetown (site of trucking company Online Transport); hourly, daily, weekly and monthly reservations.

Business Name: Truck Parking Club - Phoenix Transportation Services (Georgetown)
Description: Truck and trailer parking bookable on Truck Parking Club (also listed on TruxSpot) at 335 E Yusen Dr, Georgetown; Phoenix Transportation Services LLC is the trucking company located at this address. Hourly/daily/weekly/monthly reservations.

Bookable truck/trailer parking lot on Truck Parking Club in central Lexington with 24/7 access and a paved, gated industrial lot; listing notes it is about 2 miles from KY-4 (New Circle Rd) exit 19, in the I-75/I-64 Lexington market. Hourly/daily/weekly/monthly reservations via Truck Parking Club.
Truck and trailer parking listed on Truck Parking Club at an industrial/flex property on Enterprise Ct in Lexington; hourly, daily, weekly and monthly reservations.

Kentucky public rest area on I-75 at mile marker 82.5 (between Berea Exit 77 and Richmond Exit 83), serving both northbound and southbound lanes. Offers parking for cars, trucks, and RVs, restrooms, vending, picnic tables, and a pet area.

Bookable truck and trailer parking property in Richmond, KY listed on Truck Parking Club (hourly/daily/weekly/monthly reservations). Located on the Eastern Bypass (KY-876), the road served by I-75 Exit 87.

Business Name: First in Trailer Service (FITS) Secure Drop Lot
Description: Secure drop lot offering truck and trailer parking/storage in Walton, KY, located minutes off I-75 per the company's own site. First in Trailer Service also provides trailer rental, leasing and repair across KY, OH, IN and WV.

Independent 24/7 truck stop at I-75 Exit 76 (KY-21) in Berea with restaurant/deli, showers, laundry, free Wi-Fi, and 24-hour truck and tire service (2 service bays). Directories list 57 truck parking spots and 5 fuel lanes.
Love's Travel Stop #321 at I-75 Exit 29 in Corbin, open 24 hours with diesel, 5 showers, fast food, game room, and truck scales; a Boss Truck Shop tire/repair facility operates on site.
Pilot Travel Center #231 at I-75 Exit 29 in Corbin, open 24 hours with diesel/DEF lanes, 5 showers, CAT scale, game room, and Subway and McDonald's on site per Pilot's store listing.
Independent truck stop at I-75 Exit 144 (KY-330) in Corinth with 24-hour diesel, home-style restaurant, showers, tire repair, oil/lube, DOT inspections and road service.
Independent 24-hour fuel center and diner at I-75 Exit 49 (KY-909, near Livingston) with about 40 truck parking spaces, diesel lanes, showers, the 49er Diner, dump station, and an RV park.

TravelCenters of America full-service travel center (former TA #093) at I-75 Exit 181 in Florence, open 24 hours with 123 truck parking spaces including reserved parking, 8 diesel lanes, 6 showers, CAT scale, laundry, trucker lounge and a 6-bay TA Truck Service shop. Overnight truck parking available.
Large 24-hour Pilot Travel Center at I-75 Exit 129 in Georgetown with 12 fuel lanes, 12 showers, CAT scale, laundry, on-site Wendy's, and 4 truck service bays (Southern Tire Mart at Pilot on site).
24-hour Pilot Travel Center at I-75 Exit 129 (Cherry Blossom Way/KY-620) in Georgetown with 8 fuel lanes, CAT scale, showers, laundry and an on-site McDonald's.
Independent travel center at I-75 Exit 120 (Iron Works Pike) north of Lexington, open 7:00 AM–11:45 PM daily. Directories list truck parking, restaurant/deli, store, showers, and scales.

Speedway travel center #9651 at I-75 Exit 104 (KY-418, Athens-Boonesboro Rd), open 24 hours with commercial diesel lanes (official site: 3 diesel lanes), showers, Wi-Fi, and a certified truck scale. Directories list 125 truck parking spaces; part of Pilot's One9 Fuel Network of Speedway commercial fueling lanes.

Independent Shell-branded truck plaza at I-75 Exit 38 (KY-192) in London with about 50 truck parking spaces, showers, laundry, restaurant, trailer drop, travel store, and scales per directory listings.

Business Name: London Travel Plaza (AMBEST, formerly London Auto/Truck Center BP)
Description: Family-owned AMBEST travel plaza at I-75 Exit 41 (KY-80) in London with 9 fueling positions, over 100 free truck parking spots, CAT scale, showers, and a Southern home-cooking restaurant. Formerly known as London Auto/Truck Center (BP).

Large independent 24-hour truck plaza at I-75 Exit 62 (Renfro Valley/Mount Vernon) with directory-reported 200 parking spots, 8 fuel lanes, 24-hour restaurant, showers, 3 truck service bays with tire repair and towing, motel, and WiFi.

Independent 24-hour fuel center at I-75 Exit 59 near Mount Vernon/Livingston with truck parking in a lighted paved lot, 24-hour diesel and restaurant/deli, showers, trucker lounge, travel store, and trailer drop service.
Legacy independent truck stop at I-75 Exit 97 (US-25/US-421 S) in Richmond; historically offered truck parking, restaurant, showers, laundry, repair, and scales.

Independent Shell-branded fuel stop and food mart at I-75 Exit 95 in Richmond, open 24 hours with 2 diesel lanes, deli, and 2 showers. Directories list 10 truck parking spaces with a $10 fee and overnight parking available.
Love's Travel Stop #291 at I-75 Exit 95 in Richmond with 63 truck parking spaces, 7 private showers, CAT scale, 24-hour Arby's, and 24-hour Love's Truck Care. Fuel includes diesel, DEF, and propane.

24-hour Love's Travel Stop at I-75 Exit 136 (KY-32, Sadieville) with 80 truck parking spots, 7 showers, CAT scale, on-site restaurant (Hardee's per directories), and a 2-bay Speedco/Love's Truck Care shop.

Flying J Travel Center #664 at I-75 Exit 171 in Walton, open 24 hours with 215 truck parking spots, 12 diesel lanes, 14 showers, a Denny's restaurant, laundry, CAT scale, propane and RV dump. Located next door to the Blue Beacon truck wash.

Business Name: Mr. Fuel Travel Center (One9 Fuel Network)
Description: Mr. Fuel Travel Center (part of Pilot Flying J's One9 Fuel Network) at I-71/75 Exit 175 in Walton, open 24 hours with 7 fuel lanes, 5 showers, about 15 truck parking spots, CAT scale, ATM and convenience store.
Pilot Travel Center #321 at I-71/75 Exit 175 (Richwood) in Walton, open 24 hours with diesel lanes, showers, CAT scale, DEF lanes, ATM and premium Wi-Fi.
TravelCenters of America travel center at I-75/I-71 & KY 338, Exit 175 in Walton, open 24/7 with BP gas and diesel, 90 truck parking spaces, 6 showers plus 1 handicap shower, laundry and restrooms.

Pilot Travel Center #437 at I-75 Exit 11 in Williamsburg, open 24 hours with diesel lanes, showers, laundry, CAT scale, and EV charging; Wendy's/Huddle House food options adjacent per directory listings.

Business Name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash of Corbin
Description: Blue Beacon truck wash at I-75 Exit 29 in Corbin. Services include tractor/trailer exterior washes, reefer and dry-box trailer washouts, engine washes and RV/motorcoach washing.

Commercial cargo-tank cleaning facility at Highway Transport's Cincinnati-area service center in Florence, offering chemical tank trailer cleaning, caustic and detergent washes and steaming; a directory lists it off I-75 Exit 180. Open Monday-Friday.

Business Name: First American Truck Wash and Chrome Shop
Description: Independent truck wash and chrome shop on Triport Circle in Georgetown, in the same Triport Road commercial area as the Exit 129 truck stops. Listed as a livestock trailer washout provider by Livestock Network.

Business Name: TNT Services (Fleet Washing / Drive-Thru Truck Wash)
Description: TNT Services operates in Lexington, KY offering mobile fleet power washing and detailing plus a drive-thru truck wash bay, per its official site.
Truck wash listed at the Derby City Truck Stop property at I-75 Exit 62 in Mount Vernon, per Kentucky truck wash directories.

Business Name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash of Walton
Description: Two-bay Blue Beacon truck wash at I-75 Exit 171 in Walton, next to the Flying J travel plaza, offering truck and exterior trailer washes, trailer washouts (no tanker or livestock trailers), engine washes, aluminum brightening and undercarriage rinse.

Business Name: Kentucky Weigh Station - I-75 Southbound (Kenton County)
Description: KYTC/KSP commercial vehicle weigh and inspection station on southbound I-75 in Kenton County at about mile marker 168, roughly two miles north of the Crittenden exit (Exit 166); upgraded in 2023 with a weigh-in-motion (WIM) system that screens axle and gross weights at highway speed. PrePass-equipped inspection site.

Business Name: Kentucky Weigh Station - I-75 Northbound (Scott County)
Description: Kentucky commercial-vehicle weigh station on I-75 northbound in Scott County near Georgetown; Wikipedia notes the northbound truck scale sits just beyond the mile-127 rest area, with the exit 129 Pilot truck stops located south of the scale.

Business Name: Kentucky Weigh Station - I-75 Northbound (Laurel County)
Description: Kentucky State Police CVE weigh station on I-75 northbound in Laurel County near London, paired with the southbound mile-34 facility. KYTC implemented a new driver camera system at "its Laurel County I-75 northbound weigh station" (CVSA Guardian, Q3 2022); coopsareopen designates the I-75 northbound Post 7 site a Truck Rest Haven with safe parking.

Business Name: Kentucky Weigh Station - I-75 Southbound (Laurel County)
Description: Kentucky State Police CVE commercial vehicle weigh station on I-75 southbound at mile 34 in Laurel County, south of London. All commercial vehicles must weigh when the station is open; Kentucky sets no minimum weight threshold.
